name: Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf French or Italian bread (about 12 inches long & 2/3 inches thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not use sourdough bread. It is too salty.
2. Cut bread diagonally into 1-inch slices, without cutting through the bottom crust.
3. In a processor or blender, chop garlic fine with steel blade and add olive oil while the processor is running, to make a thin paste.
4. Slather garlic paste on bread.
5. Place in 350 degree oven directly on rack with pan on shelf below to catch drippings.
6. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes until top is crispy looking.
7. While bread is in the oven, heat whipping cream in a heavy saucepan.
8. Do not boil.
9. Stir in cheeses slowly, to make it smooth. Stir in butter. Keep warm until bread is ready.
10. Pour sauce over bread and sprinkle with parsley. Serve immediately.
